title: Body Parsing, Raw Webhooks, Forms, Multipart Uploads, and Byte Limits · Type-System Trace: Express Json Limit Inflate Verify
summary: Parsers accept decompression bombs, req.body is assumed present, raw webhook bytes are lost, multipart data is buffered without caps, and aborted uploads leak work. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsts express json limit inflate verify increment in bounded body ownership and parser matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
